name: Indiana Jones
hints: From: Movies (Indiana Jones)
About: A globe-trotting archaeologist who battles Nazis, curses, and ancient traps while recovering legendary artifacts.

name: James Bond
hints: From: Movies (James Bond)
About: A debonair British spy with a license to kill, known for his martinis, gadgets, and high-stakes missions.

name: John Wick
hints: From: Movies (John Wick)
About: A legendary hitman who comes out of retirement to avenge his dog, unleashing a trail of bullets across the underworld.

name: Jason Bourne
hints: From: Movies (Bourne)
About: A former CIA assassin suffering from amnesia who travels the globe uncovering his past and exposing government conspiracies.

name: John Rambo
hints: From: Movies (Rambo)
About: A highly skilled Vietnam War veteran who is pushed to the brink, using his survival and combat training to fight against oppression.

name: John McClane
hints: From: Movies (Die Hard)
About: A tough NYPD detective who always ends up in the wrong place at the wrong time, taking down terrorists with wit and grit.

name: Max Rockatansky
hints: From: Movies (Mad Max)
About: A lone wanderer in a post-apocalyptic wasteland who drives a souped-up car and fights for survival against ruthless warlords.

name: The Bride
hints: From: Movies (Kill Bill)
About: A former assassin who wakes from a coma and seeks bloody revenge against her former colleagues, wielding a Hattori Hanzo sword.

name: Neo
hints: From: Movies (The Matrix)
About: A hacker who discovers reality is a simulation and becomes 'The One' destined to free humanity from machine control.

name: The Terminator
hints: From: Movies (Terminator)
About: A cyborg assassin sent from the future to eliminate a key figure, known for its catchphrase and relentless pursuit.

name: RoboCop
hints: From: Movies (RoboCop)
About: A critically injured police officer resurrected as a cyborg law enforcer, struggling with his humanity while fighting crime.

name: Ellen Ripley
hints: From: Movies (Alien)
About: A tough and resourceful warrant officer who becomes the sole survivor of a space mission and faces a deadly alien creature.

name: Dutch
hints: From: Movies (Predator)
About: A special forces team leader who hunts a extraterrestrial predator in a jungle, using his wits and raw strength.

name: The Predator
hints: From: Movies (Predator)
About: An extraterrestrial hunter that stalks and hunts worthy prey for sport, equipped with advanced weaponry and cloaking technology.

name: Marty McFly
hints: From: Movies (Back to the Future)
About: A teenager who accidentally travels back in time and must ensure his parents fall in love to save his own existence.

name: Luke Skywalker
hints: From: Movies (Star Wars)
About: A farm boy who becomes a Jedi Knight and leads the Rebellion against the Galactic Empire, redeeming his father.

name: Darth Vader
hints: From: Movies (Star Wars)
About: A Sith Lord encased in black armor, former Jedi hero turned to the dark side, and father of Luke Skywalker.

name: Han Solo
hints: From: Movies (Star Wars)
About: A smuggler and rogue who becomes a key figure in the Rebellion, piloting the Millennium Falcon with his Wookiee co-pilot.

name: Princess Leia
hints: From: Movies (Star Wars)
About: A princess and rebel leader who fights against the Empire, known for her courage, wit, and iconic hairstyle.

name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
hints: From: Movies (Star Wars)
About: A wise Jedi Master who trains both Anakin and Luke Skywalker, serving as a mentor and guardian of the Force.

name: Yoda
hints: From: Movies (Star Wars)
About: A small, green Jedi Grand Master with immense wisdom and power, who trains Luke in the ways of the Force.

name: Darth Maul
hints: From: Movies (Star Wars)
About: A menacing Sith apprentice with a double-bladed lightsaber and a relentless drive for revenge.

name: Rey
hints: From: Movies (Star Wars)
About: A scavenger who discovers her Force sensitivity and becomes the last hope of the Jedi, opposing the First Order.

name: Kylo Ren
hints: From: Movies (Star Wars)
About: The conflicted son of Han Solo and Leia, who falls to the dark side and leads the Knights of Ren.

name: Frodo Baggins
hints: From: Movies (Lord of the Rings)
About: A humble hobbit who bears the One Ring on a perilous journey to destroy it in the fires of Mount Doom.

name: Samwise Gamgee
hints: From: Movies (Lord of the Rings)
About: Frodo's loyal gardener and companion, whose unwavering support and courage help carry the quest to its end.

name: Gandalf
hints: From: Movies (Lord of the Rings)
About: A wise and powerful wizard who guides the Fellowship, wielding immense magic and a sword that glows in the presence of enemies.

name: Aragorn
hints: From: Movies (Lord of the Rings)
About: The heir of Gondor, a ranger who leads the forces of Men against Sauron, wielding the reforged sword Andúril.

name: Legolas
hints: From: Movies (Lord of the Rings)
About: An elven prince and skilled archer, member of the Fellowship, who can see far and move with unmatched agility.

name: Gimli
hints: From: Movies (Lord of the Rings)
About: A dwarf warrior and member of the Fellowship, wielding a broad axe and known for his loyalty and stubbornness.

name: Harry Potter
hints: From: Movies (Harry Potter)
About: The Boy Who Lived, a young wizard who discovers his magical heritage and confronts the dark wizard who killed his parents.

name: Hermione Granger
hints: From: Movies (Harry Potter)
About: A brilliant muggle-born witch and Harry's best friend, known for her intelligence, logic, and fierce loyalty.

name: Ron Weasley
hints: From: Movies (Harry Potter)
About: Harry's loyal best friend, a pure-blood wizard from a large family, who often feels overshadowed but proves his bravery.

name: Lord Voldemort
hints: From: Movies (Harry Potter)
About: The dark wizard who seeks immortality and total dominance over the wizarding world, feared even by his own followers.

name: Albus Dumbledore
hints: From: Movies (Harry Potter)
About: The wise and powerful headmaster of Hogwarts, mentor to Harry, and the only wizard Voldemort ever feared.

name: Optimus Prime
hints: From: Movies (Transformers)
About: The noble leader of the Autobots, a sentient truck who fights to protect Earth from the Decepticons.

name: Bumblebee
hints: From: Movies (Transformers)
About: The friendly yellow Autobot scout who transforms into a Chevrolet Camaro, often serving as a guardian to humans.

name: Megatron
hints: From: Movies (Transformers)
About: The ruthless leader of the Decepticons who transforms into a Cybertronian tank, seeking to conquer the universe.

name: Starscream
hints: From: Movies (Transformers)
About: Megatron's scheming second-in-command, a sleek jet fighter who constantly plots to usurp his leader.

name: Soundwave
hints: From: Movies (Transformers)
About: Megatron's loyal communications officer, who transforms into a Cybertronian boombox and deploys cassette-like minions.

name: Grimlock
hints: From: Movies (Transformers)
About: The fierce leader of the Dinobots who transforms into a robotic Tyrannosaurus Rex, powerful and stubborn.

name: Forrest Gump
hints: From: Movies (Forrest Gump)
About: A simple-minded but kind-hearted man from Alabama who inadvertently influences several major historical events.

name: Austin Powers
hints: From: Movies (Austin Powers)
About: A groovy British spy from the 1960s who is cryogenically frozen and thawed to fight his nemesis in the 1990s.

name: Willy Wonka
hints: From: Movies (Willy Wonka)
About: The eccentric and whimsical owner of a magical chocolate factory, known for his golden tickets and quirky inventions.

name: Edward Scissorhands
hints: From: Movies (Edward Scissorhands)
About: A gentle artificial creation with scissors for hands, who struggles to fit into a suburban community.

name: Beetlejuice
hints: From: Movies (Beetlejuice)
About: A mischievous and crude ghost who is summoned to help haunt a house, causing chaos with his dark humour.

name: Buddy the Elf
hints: From: Movies (Elf)
About: A human raised by elves at the North Pole who travels to New York to find his biological father, spreading Christmas cheer.

name: Ferris Bueller
hints: From: Movies (Ferris Bueller's Day Off)
About: A charming and clever high school senior who skips school for a day of adventure in Chicago, breaking the fourth wall.

name: Ace Ventura
hints: From: Movies (Ace Ventura)
About: A zany animal detective who communicates with animals and solves pet-related crimes with his outlandish personality.

name: Lloyd Christmas
hints: From: Movies (Dumb and Dumber)
About: One half of a dim-witted duo who embark on a cross-country trip to return a lost briefcase, full of ridiculous moments.

name: Harry Dunne
hints: From: Movies (Dumb and Dumber)
About: Lloyd's equally clueless best friend, who drives a van and gets into hilarious trouble alongside him.

name: Napoleon Dynamite
hints: From: Movies (Napoleon Dynamite)
About: A quirky high school outcast who navigates rural Idaho with his best friend, known for his dance moves and deadpan delivery.

name: Tyler Durden
hints: From: Movies (Fight Club)
About: The charismatic and anarchic alter ego of a disillusioned office worker, who starts an underground fight club and plans a global revolt.

name: Hannibal Lecter
hints: From: Movies (Silence of the Lambs)
About: A brilliant psychiatrist and cannibalistic serial killer who assists the FBI in catching other killers while playing a psychological game.

name: Michael Corleone
hints: From: Movies (The Godfather)
About: The youngest son of a mafia don who transforms from a reluctant outsider to a ruthless crime boss.

name: Vito Corleone
hints: From: Movies (The Godfather)
About: The patriarch of the Corleone mafia family, known for his wisdom, respect, and the offer one cannot refuse.

name: E.T.
hints: From: Movies (E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial)
About: A gentle alien botanist stranded on Earth who befriends a young boy and tries to phone home.

name: Elliot
hints: From: Movies (E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial)
About: The young boy who discovers E.T. and forms a deep telepathic bond, helping the alien find its way home.

name: Jack Sparrow
hints: From: Movies (Pirates of the Caribbean)
About: An eccentric and cunning pirate captain with a love for rum and a unique sense of freedom, always seeking treasure.

name: Will Turner
hints: From: Movies (Pirates of the Caribbean)
About: A skilled blacksmith and pirate who is the son of a legendary pirate, fighting for freedom and love.

name: Davy Jones
hints: From: Movies (Pirates of the Caribbean)
About: The cursed captain of the Flying Dutchman, with a squid-like face, who ferries souls and rules the sea.

name: Alan Grant
hints: From: Movies (Jurassic Park)
About: A renowned paleontologist who is invited to tour a dinosaur theme park, only to face the horrors of living dinosaurs.

name: Ian Malcolm
hints: From: Movies (Jurassic Park)
About: A mathematician and chaos theorist who warns of the dangers of cloning dinosaurs, using his wit and sarcasm.

name: Rexy (T-Rex)
hints: From: Movies (Jurassic Park)
About: The iconic Tyrannosaurus Rex from Jurassic Park, a massive predator that protects its territory and provides thrilling rescues.

name: Edward Cullen
hints: From: Movies (Twilight)
About: A handsome and brooding vampire who falls in love with a human girl, struggling with his predatory instincts.

name: Bella Swan
hints: From: Movies (Twilight)
About: A human girl who moves to a rainy town and falls into a dangerous romance with a vampire, eventually becoming one herself.

name: Jacob Black
hints: From: Movies (Twilight)
About: A werewolf shape-shifter and Bella's childhood friend, who is protective of her and rivals Edward for her affection.
